description: Default capability for the main window. Grants the core defaults (event listen/unlisten, read-only window queries) plus the explicit window-write commands used by the custom Win11 titlebar (minimize / toggle-maximize / close) and the unminimize/show/set-focus needed by the single-instance Rust handler. Grants dialog:open for Ctrl+O. Filesystem grants: read-text-file (loading the .md), write-text-file + rename + remove + exists (recent.json atomic write & cleanup, PR-5a; scroll-positions.json same pattern, PR-5b). PR-8: dialog:allow-save for the right-click 'Save image as...' menu, fs:allow-write-file for binary image writes, fs:allow-mkdir + fs:allow-read-dir for the rolling-file logger's data/logs/ directory creation + bak cleanup. Filesystem scope is intentionally unrestricted in v0.1: the user explicitly chooses every file they open. Shell grant: open (PR-5b) for R7 link routing — http/https/mailto + local-non-md open via system default app; scope is permissive in v0.1 (security model: user authored every link).
